title: Sacratia AI
author: SacratiaAi
selftext:
I am an 18 year old coding developer with years of research and development, i have successfully built an enhanced AI indicator Bot for all stocks! 

SacratiaAi follows trend, momentum, ATR, ADX, Live news and historical data! 

This bot will give you a guaranteed 90%+ WR but not 100%. As many people would scam others to buy their “100% WR Ai bot” that is not what SacratiaAI does. we do not guarantee any 100% profit but will guarantee yourself higher wins, profits and consistency. you can use all time frames from whatever your happy with such as scalping, day trading, swing trading or investing, SacratiaAi does it all for you! 

We will give out 24/7 support and be the first 20 to receive our 50% discount of my first product for only £35/m

Why not check it out??

(Disclaimer: I am not a financial advisor, i am a coding developer)

comments.author: datedbrent
comments.body:
Winrate alone is meaningless. you could have a 40% win rate and be profitable or an 80% winrate and unprofitable. 

Have you actually forward tested this in real markets, and if so what does it look like with all the details, not just WR.

replies.author: SacratiaAi
replies.body: this is real markets . i have forward and back tested and the bot will give you a signal wether to buy/sell telling you your SL, TP 1,2 and 3, Shows the position of the market from Bull, Flat, Bearish, follows trend, momentum, ATR, ADX and Live news! next update of following will be a confidence level of how confident the ai bot is to the trade. I have been testing this AI for now 6 months and see no problems at all with it. Yes WR is unnecessary as yes you can get a 40% WR and 60% loss. but you can configure the settings to however you like it. this ai will make Scalping, Daytrading and swing trading way easier to also create less hassle on finding strategies when the Bot has been coded a strategy that would work on any stock, forex, crypto etc. It had been in making for over a year and half and the first product of the SacratiaAI indicator has just been only released recently. Finding it hard to promote the product i have made as people would assume this is a scam but i am telling you now. IT IS NOT A SCAM. THIS IS A LEGITIMATE BUSINESS OF SACRATIA AI ( NO FINANCIAL ADVISE ) this is a product NOT a financial advisor.

replies.author: datedbrent
replies.body: ok didnt quite answer my question, so where can i test and get the details?

replies.author: SacratiaAi
replies.body: well this is not a free product, tho for the first 20 people they will be offered a 50% off discount for only £35/month for the AI. This Ai indicator will not let you down i promise.

comments.author: amazinZero
comments.body: Just give us myfxbook link to prove your strategy, we ll have a look.

replies.author: SacratiaAi
replies.body: don’t have myfxbook set up but i will set it up now just to prove everyone that this Ai indicator is worth it.

comments.author: amazinZero
comments.body: What YEARS of research actually mean?

replies.author: SacratiaAi
replies.body: I have studied coding development for 4 years and market analysis for now 2 years. still am iffy about finding where market could potentially lead so i have developed an AI bot that will give me insane accuracy signals and its own strategy to follow the markets precisely. This indicator can be used for all stocks,Forex, Indices, Futures, Crypto, Bonds, Funds etc.
